name: WLF_LEARNING_ITEMS_F
description: Table to store language-independent information of learning item objects.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: FEATURED_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the featured date

columns.Name: FEATURED_END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the featured end date

columns.Name: FEATURED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Featured learning items recommended by Admin

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: LI level default access permission id

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: Polymorphic discriminator column { DOCUMENT, VIDEO, TUTORIAL ... }.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_SUB_TYPE
columns.Comments: Learning Item sub type for the learning item type like ELearning. eg: Tutorial, Video etc.

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Learning Item Category to differentiate same learning item type objects

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column stores the learning item number

columns.Name: UUID
columns.Comments: UUID for Learning Item from table

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: Information about location of the content object.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Current status of the content object {ACTIVE, DELETED}.

columns.Name: SS_VIEW_MODE
columns.Comments: LI level default self-service view mode

columns.Name: ADMIN_ACCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: LI level default admin access mode

columns.Name: VISIBILITY
columns.Comments: Visibility of the content object {PUBLIC, PRIVATE, UNLISTED}.

columns.Name: THUMBNAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Thumbnail associated with the content object.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Video section duration or description duration for non-video section.

columns.Name: DURATION_UOM
columns.Comments: This column stores the duration uom

columns.Name: TRAILER_LI_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the trailer learning item id

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the language id

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Language of the learning item. FND Lookup column

columns.Name: AUTO_COMPETANCY_UPDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates auto competancy update flag

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Indicates if assignment rule is enabled

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the assignment rule

columns.Name: ERES_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Indicates eres is enabled for learning item

columns.Name: SOURCE_INFO
columns.Comments: This column stores the source information

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the source type

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the source id

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the start date

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This column stores the end date

columns.Name: OWNED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who ownes the content object.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who created the content object.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the attribution id

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the attribution type

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: DELETED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who deleted the content object.

columns.Name: DELETED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the deletion of the content object.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CO_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: PRICE
columns.Comments: Indicates the cost of the learning item

columns.Name: MIN_PRICE
columns.Comments: Indicates the minimum cost of the learning item

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the currency type of the price column

columns.Name: PRICING_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule. Foreign key to WLF_PRICING_RULES_F.

columns.Name: ADMIN_ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Admin access permission identifier

columns.Name: ADMIN_VIEW_ACCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: This column stores various options for admin's view access mode for admin managed learning items

columns.Name: ADMIN_ADMINISTRATION_MODE
columns.Comments: This column stores various options for admin's administration access mode for admin managed learning items

columns.Name: INSTRUCT_ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Instructor access permission identifier

columns.Name: LI_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates learning item start date

columns.Name: LI_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates learning item end date

columns.Name: TIME_ZONE
columns.Comments: Indicates time zone of learning start and end dates

columns.Name: CALCULATED_RATING
columns.Comments: Indicates learning item rating

columns.Name: RATING_COUNT
columns.Comments: Indicates learning item rating count

columns.Name: IS_GLOBAL_AG
columns.Comments: The column will have value "Y" for GLOBAL access groups and "N" for follow and adhoc access groups

columns.Name: PAYMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule Payment Type. Foreign key to WLF_PAYMENT_RULES_F

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_URL
columns.Comments: This column stores external URL for a non-catalog learning item.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: This column represents storage provider for Video or Image. Strorage Provider is actual loaction where content binary data stored. Example : Akamai,UCM

columns.Name: THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: This column represents storage provider for Thumbanil or Cover Art images. Strorage Provider is actual loaction where content binary data stored. Example : Akamai,UCM

columns.Name: LI_CHANGE_EVENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the time when learning item has material changes for learning item change event job to run.

columns.Name: RECONCILE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the time when reconcile is started to process learning item change event.

columns.Name: RECONCILE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the time when reconcile is completed to process learning item change event.

columns.Name: RECONCILE_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the Latest Reconcile ESS JOB ID ran for processing learning item change event.

columns.Name: VIEW_COUNT
columns.Comments: This attribute will store view count for a given learning item.

columns.Name: IS_XML_KEYWORDS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: Column to have value 'Y' once xml keywords are processed after last update from application.

columns.Name: IS_SEARCH_TERMS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: Column to have value 'Y' once search terms are processed after last update from application.

columns.Name: IN_ATTACHMENTS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the content media file is in FND Attachments. Possible values are NEEDED/DONE/FAILED.

columns.Name: ENVIRONMENT_REFRESH
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the content item is enabled for environment refresh. Possible values are ENABLED/DISABLED.

columns.Name: IS_AI_SKILLS_PROCESSED
columns.Comments: Column to have value 'Y' once AI suggested skills are processed after last update from application.

columns.Name: IS_RECONCILE_READY
columns.Comments: Indicates reconcile is done for learning item

columns.Name: EFFORT_IN_SECONDS
columns.Comments: This column stores the effort in seconds

columns.Name: SEND_ALERT
columns.Comments: Column to have value 'Y' to send alerts to learns after reconcilation.

columns.Name: PUBLISHER_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the publisher type

columns.Name: AUTHOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the author person id

columns.Name: AUTHOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the author type

columns.Name: AUTHOR_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: This column stores the author display name

columns.Name: AUTHOR_PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column stores the author person number

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the instructor person id

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the instructor type

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: This column stores the instructor display name

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This column stores the instructor person number

columns.Name: PROVIDER
columns.Comments: This column stores the provider

columns.Name: PROVIDER_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores the provider type

columns.Name: COORDINATOR_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates person id of the coordinator

columns.Name: COORDINATOR_PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates person number of the coordinator

columns.Name: BUSINESS_DRIVER
columns.Comments: This column stores the business driver

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_PATTERN
columns.Comments: This column stores the notification pattern

columns.Name: LEARNING_LEVEL
columns.Comments: This column stores the learning level

columns.Name: CPE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column stores continued professional education type. This column accepts values for lookup ORA_WLF_CPE_TYPE

columns.Name: PUBLISHER_NAME
columns.Comments: This column stores the publisher name

columns.Name: CPE_POINTS
columns.Comments: This column stores continued professional education points for the given continued professional education type stored in CPE_TYPE column

columns.Name: AUTHORED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Provider learning item authored date

columns.Name: PROVIDER_SKILLS_QUALIFICATIONS
columns.Comments: This column stores the skills and qualifications

columns.Name: PROVIDER_CATEGORY_TOPICS
columns.Comments: This column stores the categories and topics

columns.Name: PROVIDER_SOURCE
columns.Comments: This column stores the provider source mapping type and content codes

columns.Name: PROVIDER_CATEGORIES_STRUCTURED
columns.Comments: Categories and Topics Structured

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Learning Item Version Number

columns.Name: REACTIVATE_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for reactivation

columns.Name: INACTIVATE_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for inactivation

columns.Name: DELETE_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Reason code for deletion

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: User Comments while triggering any status action on learning item

columns.Name: INACTIVATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Item inactivation date

columns.Name: REACTIVATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning item reactivation date

columns.Name: ACTIVATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Item activation date

columns.Name: SOURCE_PUBLISHED_DATE
columns.Comments: Content provider source publisher date

columns.Name: COMPLETION_CERTIFICATE_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Indicates if certificate is enabled or not
